activeProjects.name: Spreadsheet-Native Full Rollout

activeProjects.name: TERP - Orders Spreadsheet Runtime Rollout
activeProjects.description: Make Orders the first rollout-ready sheet-native surface by adding full spreadsheet interaction parity on top of the existing anti-drift contract and Orders workflow.

activeProjects.description: Close the unresolved March 10 staging screen-recording backlog with proof-based coverage control and final replay signoff.
